478 games, 45% winrate, 44 years old. The trifecta of a man who has nothing to prove and everything to lose.
kevin: Archon 2 with a 51.8% winrate. The bar was on the floor and you tripped over it.

12.6 average assists. Translation: he stands near the kills and hopes.

522 GPM, 256 APM, 1167 games. Forgettable. Refreshingly, for once, not actively negative.

byHero.Bristleback: A hero with backwards armor. You faced your enemies the wrong way.
byHero.Nature's Prophet: Global mobility, zero accountability. The free-jumper.
byHero.Vengeful Spirit: Position 4. 22 deaths. The vengeance was on yourself.
byHero.Lich: Press Q at frozen creeps. You missed.
byHero.Zeus: Cannot move out of fountain in 11 deaths.
byHero.Tinker: Refused to call GG. Refused to leave the rearm.
byHero.Sand King: 666 games in the sand. The scorpion chose you. Or you chose the scorpion. Either way, Archon 2.
byHero.Nyx Assassin: An assassin who dies before the assassination. The irony is structural.
byHero.Outworld Devourer: The big-brain hero. 302 games. 50.3% winrate. The brain is average-sized.
byHero.Slardar: An underwater troll who charges face-first. You related to every part of that sentence.
byHero.Spirit Breaker: Charges in a straight line. Cannot be steered. Does not want to be.
byHero.Mirana: Press W. Hope. Repeat for 678 games.
byHero.Rubick: You steal the enemy's best spell and use it on a creep.
byHero.Lion: Stun into Finger. Two buttons. 48.5%. Both buttons were wrong.
byHero.Viper: Slow, unflashable, impossible to kill. You found a way.
byHero.Necrophos: Death charges you rent every four seconds. You always pay.
byHero.Dark Seer: The hero who needs to understand the game. Game not understood.
byHero.Marci: Full kit. Zero cooldown. 42.2%. The hero was not the problem.
byHero.Primal Beast: A monster that screams and runs into things. A scouting report, basically.
byHero.Omniknight: Press R, become unkillable for 4 seconds. The 4-second window has a 66% close rate.
byHero.Chaos Knight: RNG hero. Even chaos likes kevin more than it likes the others.
byHero.Arc Warden: You make a clone of yourself so you can feed on two parts of the map simultaneously.
byHero.Undying: You come back from death. You go back to death. The cycle is complete.
byHero.Bounty Hunter: Tracks enemies. Earns gold. Still Archon. The bounty on improvement remains uncollected.

skogix: The 22 deaths on Bristleback were strategic map pressure. Someone has to test their fountain.
499 GPM is a lifestyle, not a statistic.
I'm not hardstuck Guardian 4. The 3550 games are a longitudinal study.
zcope: The trees moved. All 678 arrows were on target when fired.
21 deaths on Lina is just aggressive vision placement.
4829 games isn't an addiction, it's a data set.
nagasaki: 8.2 deaths a game is space creation. You're welcome.
Dark Seer IS a tempo pick. The tempo is theirs, but it's a tempo.
389 APM means I'm doing a lot. Define 'useful'.
kevin: I can't carry four grown men at 133 APM. Physically. The wrists.
The 75-minute Venge game was performance art.
Someone has to stand near the kills. 12.6 assists of pure presence.
jagger: Sand King has been nerfed every patch since 2012. Game 667 will be different.
My APM was higher before they changed the map. In 2014.
666 Sand King games isn't a rut. It's a religion.
